[[BLOCK:slide65_shape1]]
Currently, performing Generalized Regression (广义回归 (Generalized Regression)) modeling in SAS and JASP appears to be more flexible compared to their Python counterparts.  
In SAS and JASP, users can easily switch between LASSO, Ridge Regression (岭回归 (Ridge)), and Elastic Net (弹性网络 (Elastic NET)).  
However, in Python, users need to call specific selection methods throughout the entire program (e.g., `from sklearn.linear_model import ElasticNetCV` or `from sklearn.linear_model import LassoCV`). Instead of making a single change, users must replace all content related to one selection method with another.
